import io
import string

mut last: Option<String> = None
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let t = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(t)
      last = Some(line)
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

match last
when Some(line)
  println(line)
when None
  println("(none)")
end
